query:
INSERT INTO tachyon_apps_compute.deployments
            (id, app_id, build_id, environment, pr_number,
             status, cloud_run_service_name,
             cloud_run_revision,
             pages_project_name, pages_deployment_id,
             url, public_url,
             scaling_min_instances, scaling_max_instances,
             scaling_cpu, scaling_memory,
             scaling_concurrency, created_at, updated_at)
            VALUES
            (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?,
             ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)
